subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for the note. I'm open to a short meeting to discuss potential collaboration. I’m available on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, or 2026-04-23, each from 14:00 to 16:00 UTC. Send a slot that works best and I’ll do my best to accommodate it.

I can’t share internal contact information or direct phone lines. Please refer to the public website for general contact details and company information.

Best,
[Your Name]
